    MatrixFactory.createAutomaticStorage(E[][] data, Ring<E> ring)

    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    RealDoubleMatrixStorage
    Optimized storage for double-precision real matrices.
    Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.storage that implement MatrixStorage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BandedMatrixStorage<E>
    Storage for banded matrices.
    class 
    DenseMatrixStorage<E>
    Dense row-major matrix storage.
    class 
    DiagonalMatrixStorage<E>
    Diagonal matrix storage - only stores diagonal elements.
    class 
    DirectRealDoubleMatrixStorage
    Off-heap storage for RealDoubleMatrix using java.nio.DoubleBuffer.
    class 
    HeapRealDoubleMatrixStorage
     
    class 
    SparseMatrixStorage<E>
    Sparse matrix storage using a Map.
    class 
    SymmetricMatrixStorage<E>
    Symmetric matrix storage - stores only upper triangle.
    class 
    TiledMatrixStorage
    Storage implementation for tiled matrices.
    class 
    TriangularMatrixStorage<E>
    Storage for lower or upper triangular matrices.
    class 
    TridiagonalMatrixStorage<E>
    Storage for tridiagonal matrices.
